sourceName: HUD Difficult Development Areas 2026 - Bay Area FMR Area Counts
jurisdiction: San Francisco Bay Area HUD FMR/MSA areas
notes: Official HUD open-data ArcGIS layer for LIHTC Difficult Development Areas. In metropolitan areas HUD designates DDAs along Census ZIP Code Tabulation Area boundaries, so this config imports only ZCTA identifiers and HUD FMR/MSA area labels for Bay Area-related HUD areas and stores aggregate ZCTA counts. It does not request geometry, addresses, people, households, owners, contacts, parcel records, property names, or resident records.
